title: Is there a flashable firmware for this SX1262 board with a STM32 board ?

messages.author: Richard Clark
messages.text: I just found this on AliExpress: | SX1262 LoRa Wireless Module 868Mhz 915Mhz 433 475Mhz DX-LR30 22dBm 8KM Long Range SMD RF Module Power Supply https://a.aliexpress.com/_EwFupuK So I have ordered 2, along with others (I assume) looking at the previously purchased numbers.
messages.content_html: I just found this on AliExpress: | SX1262 LoRa Wireless Module 868Mhz 915Mhz 433 475Mhz DX-LR30 22dBm 8KM Long Range SMD RF Module Power Supply https://a.aliexpress.com/_EwFupuK So I have ordered 2, along with others (I assume) looking at the previously purchased numbers.

messages.author: Richard Clark
messages.text: Speaking with DX-smart today, they have said their board uses STM32F103 + external SX1262. Does anyone know how to proceed with this ?
messages.content_html: Speaking with DX-smart today, they have said their board uses STM32F103 + external SX1262. Does anyone know how to proceed with this ?
